name: Cheese-Herb Pretzels
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F (190°C).
2. Mix flour, Parmesan cheese, garlic powder, basil, rosemary, and oregano in a bowl.
3. Gradually add butter and sharp cheddar cheese until dough is well combined.
4. Roll out dough on a floured surface into a rectangle about 1/4 inch thick.
5. Cut the rectangle into desired pretzel shapes using a knife or cookie cutter.
6. Place dough pieces on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
7. Bake in preheated oven for 15-20 minutes, until golden brown and crispy.
8. Remove from oven and let cool completely before serving.
Note: Be careful when handling hot dough to avoid burns.
